properties.name: expanded
properties.description: The panel is expanded or closed

properties.name: pushContent
properties.description: Determines if the panel pushes content or displays an overlay.

properties.name: targetElement
properties.description: Target element reference to push content when panel opens

events.name: panelOpened
events.description: An event that fires when the panel is opened.

events.name: panelClosed
events.description: An event that fires when the panel is closed.
